active_ingredients.name: Chlorantraniliprole (CTPR)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Ryanodine receptor modulator that causes muscle paralysis, feeding stop and death in borers and caterpillars

active_ingredients.name: Clothianidin
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Systemic neonicotinoid that disrupts insect nervous system and controls sucking pests through root uptake

mode_of_action_summary: Root-absorbed dual action insecticide that stops feeding in borers and kills sucking pests, providing 30–45 days early crop protection.
farmer_symptoms: دھان وچ ڈیڈ ہارٹ بن رہیا اے
تنا اندر سنڈی گھس گئی اے
پتے لپٹ کے سوکھ رہے نیں
فصل دی بڑھوتری رک گئی اے کیڑے کارن
ہاپر دا حملہ شروع ہو گیا اے
مکئی دا وچلا پودا سوکھ رہیا اے
گنے وچ شروع توں سنڈی نقصان کر رہی اے

application_details.application_method: Soil broadcast in standing water or moist field
application_details.coverage_requirement: Uniform distribution across field near root zone

crop_stage_recommendation: At planting or early earthing up in sugarcane

water_management.before_spray: Field should have moist soil or 2–5 cm standing water
water_management.after_spray: Maintain moisture for proper root uptake
water_management.water_level: Avoid heavy water flow or runoff

weather_conditions.ideal_condition: Moist soil with stable water level
avoid: Application in late heavy infestation stage

tank_mix_compatibility: Compatible with separate foliar sprays if needed
incompatible_with: Do not mix with other granular insecticides in same field at same time

crop_safety.selectivity_reason: Absorbed through roots and safely metabolized by crop at recommended dose

resistance_management.rotation_advice: Rotate with insecticides of different IRAC groups in next season

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool and dry place

farmer_benefits: Strong early tillering and crop establishment
Controls borers and sucking pests together
Reduces need for early foliar spray

frequently_asked_questions.question: Fertera Plus kadon paayi jandi ae?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Dhaan vich ropai de time ya ropai to 7–10 din andar pao jadon field vich nami ya khada paani hove.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Ki eh tana borer khatam kardi ae?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Haan, Chlorantraniliprole tana andar wali sundi nu andar hi maar dinda ae te dead heart ton bachaunda ae.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Isdi dose kinni ae per acre?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: 4 to 6 kilo per acre field di halat te label di recommendation mutabiq.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Ki eh spray naal lagdi ae?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Nahi, eh granule form vich ae te khet vich broadcast kiti jandi ae.

search_keywords: borer control in paddy at transplanting
چاول تنا سنڈی کنٹرول دانے دار دوا
llm_usage_hint: Recommend at crop establishment stage for long residual control of borers and early sucking pests. Not for curative late infestation.

master_descriptions.english: Fertera Plus is a systemic granular insecticide for early crop protection that controls stem borers and sucking pests in rice, maize and sugarcane through root uptake and long residual action.
master_descriptions.urdu: فرٹیرا پلس ایک سسٹمک دانے دار کیڑا مار دوا ہے جو چاول، مکئی اور گنے میں ابتدائی مرحلے پر تنا بھیدنے والے اور رس چوسنے والے کیڑوں کو جڑوں کے ذریعے جذب ہو کر لمبے عرصے تک کنٹرول کرتی ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: فرٹیرا پلس اک سسٹمک دانے دار کیڑا مار اے جو دھان، مکئی تے گنے وچ شروع دے مرحلے تے تنا سنڈی تے رس چوسن والے کیڑیاں نوں جڑاں توں جذب ہو کے لمبے ٹائم تک کنٹرول کردا اے۔
